languages.text: "Это богохульство против {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающего{/g}. Оскорбление Домин. И плевок на честь всей Паутины". {n}Девушка берется за один из многочисленных ножей и медленно проводит клинком по лицу, оставляя алый след.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Это богохульство против {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающего{/g}. Оскорбление Домин. И плевок на честь всей Паутины". {n}Девушка берется за один из многочисленных ножей и медленно проводит клинком по лицу, оставляя алый след.{/n}
traits.speaker: KibellahCompanion

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]"Это богохульство против {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающего{/g}. Оскорбление Домин. И плевок на честь всей Паутины". {n}Девушка берется за один из многочисленных ножей и медленно проводит клинком по лицу, оставляя алый след.{/n}

languages.text: "This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a dishonour to all of the Bloodspun Web." {n}Kibellah retrieves one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Это богохульство против {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающего{/g}. Оскорбление Домин. И плевок на честь всей Паутины". {n}Девушка берется за один из многочисленных ножей и медленно проводит клинком по лицу, оставляя алый след.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a spitting upon the honour of the entire Web." {n}The woman reaches for one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}

"This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a spitting upon the honour of the entire Web." {n}The woman reaches for one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}

"This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a spit in the face to the whole Web." {n}The woman retrieves one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}

"This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a spit in the face to the whole Web." {n}The woman retrieves one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}

"This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a dishonour to all of the Bloodspun Web." {n}Kibellah retrieves one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}

languages.text: «Esto es una blasfemia ante el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Inmortal{/g}. Un insulto a{mf|l| la} Domin. Y una deshonra para toda la Red». {n}Kibellah saca uno de sus muchos cuchillos y se lo pasa por la cara, dejando una estela escarlata.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a dishonour to all of the Bloodspun Web." {n}Kibellah retrieves one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Esto es una blasfemia ante el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Inmortal{/g}. Un insulto a{mf|l| la} Domin. Y una deshonra para toda la Red». {n}Kibellah saca uno de sus muchos cuchillos y se lo pasa por la cara, dejando una estela escarlata.{/n}

languages.text: “这是对{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}不死之神{/g}的亵渎。是对秘者的侮辱。更是对整个织血罗网的不敬。”{n}绮贝菈抽出她众多刀刃中的一把，缓缓将锋刃划过面庞，留下一道殷红的轨迹。{/n}
languages.original_text: "This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a dishonour to all of the Bloodspun Web." {n}Kibellah retrieves one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这是对{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}不死之神{/g}的亵渎。是对秘者的侮辱。更是对整个织血罗网的不敬。”{n}绮贝菈抽出她众多刀刃中的一把，缓缓将锋刃划过面庞，留下一道殷红的轨迹。{/n}

languages.text: « C'est un blasphème envers l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Immortel{/g}, une insulte envers {mf|le|la} Domin et une honte pour la Toile sanglante tout entière. » {n}Kibellah s'empare de l'une de ses nombreuses lames et la passe lentement sur son visage, laissant un sillage pourpre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a dishonour to all of the Bloodspun Web." {n}Kibellah retrieves one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « C'est un blasphème envers l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Immortel{/g}, une insulte envers {mf|le|la} Domin et une honte pour la Toile sanglante tout entière. » {n}Kibellah s'empare de l'une de ses nombreuses lames et la passe lentement sur son visage, laissant un sillage pourpre.{/n}

languages.text: "Bu, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Ölmeyen'e {/g} edilmiş bir küfürdür. Domin'e hakarettir. Kanipi Ağı'nın onuruna leke sürmektir." {n}Kibellah, sayısız bıçağından birini çıkarıyor ve yavaşça yüzünde gezdirerek ardında kızıl bir iz bırakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a dishonour to all of the Bloodspun Web." {n}Kibellah retrieves one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bu, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Ölmeyen'e {/g} edilmiş bir küfürdür. Domin'e hakarettir. Kanipi Ağı'nın onuruna leke sürmektir." {n}Kibellah, sayısız bıçağından birini çıkarıyor ve yavaşça yüzünde gezdirerek ardında kızıl bir iz bırakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Das ist Blasphemie gegen den {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Todlosen{/g}. Eine Beleidigung {mf|des|der} Domin. Eine Entehrung des gesamten Blutgesponnenen Netzes." {n}Kibellah nimmt eines ihrer Messer, zieht die Klinge langsam über ihr Gesicht und fügt sich eine blutende Wunde zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a dishonour to all of the Bloodspun Web." {n}Kibellah retrieves one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Das ist Blasphemie gegen den {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Todlosen{/g}. Eine Beleidigung {mf|des|der} Domin. Eine Entehrung des gesamten Blutgesponnenen Netzes." {n}Kibellah nimmt eines ihrer Messer, zieht die Klinge langsam über ihr Gesicht und fügt sich eine blutende Wunde zu.{/n}

languages.text: "これは{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}不滅の者{/g} に対する冒涜だ。ドミンへの侮辱だ。そしてブラッドスパン・ウェブ全体への冒涜だ」。{n}キベラは数あるナイフの一つを取り出すと、ゆっくりと顔面に刃を向け、その跡に深紅の軌跡を残す。{/n}
languages.original_text: "This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a dishonour to all of the Bloodspun Web." {n}Kibellah retrieves one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "これは{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}不滅の者{/g} に対する冒涜だ。ドミンへの侮辱だ。そしてブラッドスパン・ウェブ全体への冒涜だ」。{n}キベラは数あるナイフの一つを取り出すと、ゆっくりと顔面に刃を向け、その跡に深紅の軌跡を残す。{/n}
